Class Player

java.lang.Object
Player
public class Player extends Object
Represents the player in the game. Stores the player's current room and navigation history.
Version:
2026.05.09
Author:
Raphaël Quillaud

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Player(String pName, Room pStartRoom, int pMaxWeight)
    Constructor for Player.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Item
    drop(String pName)
    Removes and returns the item with the given name from the inventory.
    Room
    getCurrentRoom()
    Returns the current room of the player.
    String
    getInventoryString()
    Returns a string listing all items carried by the player.
    Item
    getItem(String pName)
    Returns the item with the given name without removing it.
    int
    getMaxWeight()
    Returns the player's maximum carrying capacity.
    String
    getName()
    Returns the player's name.
    int
    getRemainingMoves()
    Returns the number of remaining moves.
    String
    getWeightString()
    Returns a string describing the current and maximum weight carried by the player.
    boolean
    goBack()
    Moves the player back to the previous room.
    void
    goTo(Room pRoom)
    Moves the player to the given room and saves the previous one.
    boolean
    hasItem(String pName)
    Returns true if the player is carrying the item with the given name.
    boolean
    hasItems()
    Returns true if the player is carrying at least one item.
    void
    incrementMoves()
    Increments the move counter by one.
    boolean
    isOutOfTime()
    Returns true if the player has exceeded the maximum number of moves.
    boolean
    pickUp(Item pItem)
    Makes the player pick up the given item.
    void
    removeItem(String pName)
    Removes the item with the given name from the player's inventory.
    void
    setMaxWeight(int pMaxWeight)
    Updates the player's maximum carrying capacity.

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Player

      public Player(String pName, Room pStartRoom, int pMaxWeight)
      Constructor for Player.
      Parameters:
      pName - the player's name
      pStartRoom - the room where the player starts
      pMaxWeight - the maximum weight the player can carry

  • Method Details

    • incrementMoves

      public void incrementMoves()
      Increments the move counter by one.

    • isOutOfTime

      public boolean isOutOfTime()
      Returns true if the player has exceeded the maximum number of moves.

    • getRemainingMoves

      public int getRemainingMoves()
      Returns the number of remaining moves.

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the player's name.
      Returns:
      the name of the player

    • getCurrentRoom

      public Room getCurrentRoom()
      Returns the current room of the player.
      Returns:
      the current Room object

    • goTo

      public void goTo(Room pRoom)
      Moves the player to the given room and saves the previous one. Does nothing if pRoom is null.
      Parameters:
      pRoom - the room to move to

    • goBack

      public boolean goBack()
      Moves the player back to the previous room. Returns false if there is no previous room.
      Returns:
      true if the player moved back, false otherwise

    • hasItem

      public boolean hasItem(String pName)
      Returns true if the player is carrying the item with the given name.
      Parameters:
      pName - the name of the item to check
      Returns:
      true if the item is in the inventory, false otherwise

    • hasItems

      public boolean hasItems()
      Returns true if the player is carrying at least one item.
      Returns:
      true if inventory is not empty, false otherwise

    • pickUp

      public boolean pickUp(Item pItem)
      Makes the player pick up the given item.
      Parameters:
      pItem - the Item to pick up

    • drop

      public Item drop(String pName)
      Removes and returns the item with the given name from the inventory. Returns null if the player is not carrying that item.
      Parameters:
      pName - the name of the item to drop
      Returns:
      the dropped Item, or null if not found

    • removeItem

      public void removeItem(String pName)
      Removes the item with the given name from the player's inventory.
      Parameters:
      pName - the name of the item to remove

    • getInventoryString

      public String getInventoryString()
      Returns a string listing all items carried by the player.
      Returns:
      a description of the player's inventory

    • getWeightString

      public String getWeightString()
      Returns a string describing the current and maximum weight carried by the player.
      Returns:
      a string representation of the carried weight

    • setMaxWeight

      public void setMaxWeight(int pMaxWeight)
      Updates the player's maximum carrying capacity.
      Parameters:
      pMaxWeight - the new maximum weight

    • getMaxWeight

      public int getMaxWeight()
      Returns the player's maximum carrying capacity.
      Returns:
      the maximum weight

    • getItem

      public Item getItem(String pName)
      Returns the item with the given name without removing it. Returns null if not found.
      Parameters:
      pName - the name of the item
